student_modification: N/A — no LLM-generated code was used verbatim. All implementation decisions were made independently.

interactions.prompt: For the SMM paper, what are two components I could ablate to test the method's sensitivity?
interactions.purpose: Brainstorming ablation candidates — I then independently chose and justified the embedding kernel and level-2 kernel
interactions.note: The choice of which components to ablate was made independently after understanding the paper's Table 2 (which shows embedding vs level-2 kernel sensitivity).

interactions.prompt: How do I run a linear SVM on a precomputed kernel matrix in sklearn?
interactions.purpose: Clarifying whether kernel='linear' can accept a precomputed matrix (it cannot — used separate approach)

interactions.prompt: Help me write a seaborn/matplotlib bar chart with error bars showing ablation results.
interactions.purpose: Plotting assistance for the ablation bar charts
